name: Backward Text Generator
description_short: A simple online tool to reverse text, flip letters, and create mirror writing easily.
description_long: Backward Text Generator is a versatile online utility designed for social media creators and puzzle enthusiasts. It allows users to reverse string order, flip text upside down, and generate mirrored content for unique styling or creative projects.

name: Catan Board Generator
description_short: Generate balanced and fair maps for Settlers of Catan games instantly.
description_long: An essential companion for Catan players. This generator creates randomized yet balanced board layouts to ensure every game is fair and competitive, preventing resource clustering and optimizing tile placement.

name: ReelMuse AI
description_short: AI-powered creative assistant for short-form video scripts and social media content.
description_long: ReelMuse AI leverages advanced language models to help creators generate engaging scripts for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts. It focuses on viral hooks and structured storytelling to boost audience engagement.

name: SweetAI Chat
description_short: A personalized AI chat platform offering warm, supportive, and intelligent conversations.
description_long: SweetAI is a friendly AI companion designed for natural language interaction. It provides a safe space for brainstorming, emotional support, and productivity assistance with a focus on a gentle user experience.
